name: Etiracetam
description: Etiracetam is under investigation in clinical trial NCT01137110 (Comparison of Short Duration Levetiracetam to Extended Course for Seizure Prophylaxis After Subarachnoid Hemorrhage (SAH)).

interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Etiracetam can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.

interactions.name: Pregabalin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Etiracetam can be decreased when used in combination with Pregabalin.

interactions.name: Mianserin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Etiracetam can be decreased when used in combination with Mianserin.

interactions.name: Orlistat
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Etiracetam can be decreased when it is combined with Orlistat.
